'''鈭歡-p-ch''' ('''gapacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chariot|chariot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chariot|chariot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-p-ch
|-
! Lemma
| gapacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gapachithi|gapachithi]] || [[word:gapachiji|gapachiji]] || [[word:gapachishi|gapachishi]] || [[word:gapachi|gapachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapachuthuth|gapachuthuth]] || [[word:gapachujuj|gapachujuj]] || [[word:gapachushush|gapachushush]] || [[word:gapach|gapach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapachuthu|gapachuthu]] || [[word:gapachuju|gapachuju]] || [[word:gapachushu|gapachushu]] || [[word:gapachu|gapachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapachufuth|gapachufuth]] || [[word:gapachufuj|gapachufuj]] || [[word:gapachufush|gapachufush]] || [[word:gapachuf|gapachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gapachethe|gapachethe]] || [[word:gapacheje|gapacheje]] || [[word:gapacheshe|gapacheshe]] || [[word:gapache|gapache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapachothoth|gapachothoth]] || [[word:gapachojoj|gapachojoj]] || [[word:gapachoshosh|gapachoshosh]] || [[word:gapach|gapach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapachotho|gapachotho]] || [[word:gapachojo|gapachojo]] || [[word:gapachosho|gapachosho]] || [[word:gapacho|gapacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapachofoth|gapachofoth]] || [[word:gapachofoj|gapachofoj]] || [[word:gapachofosh|gapachofosh]] || [[word:gapachof|gapachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gapach忙th忙|gapach忙th忙]] || [[word:gapach忙j忙|gapach忙j忙]] || [[word:gapach忙sh忙|gapach忙sh忙]] || [[word:gapach忙|gapach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapachathath|gapachathath]] || [[word:gapachajaj|gapachajaj]] || [[word:gapachashash|gapachashash]] || [[word:gapach|gapach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapachatha|gapachatha]] || [[word:gapachaja|gapachaja]] || [[word:gapachasha|gapachasha]] || [[word:gapacha|gapacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapachafath|gapachafath]] || [[word:gapachafaj|gapachafaj]] || [[word:gapachafash|gapachafash]] || [[word:gapachaf|gapachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gapachasha|gapachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogapachasha|gogapachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigapachasha|gokigapachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gapachn眉sha|gapachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogapachnkn眉sha|gogapachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigapachn眉sha|gokigapachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gapachsh毛sha|gapachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogapachnksh毛sha|gogapachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigapachsh毛sha|gokigapachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapachrosha|gapachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapachnkrosha|gogapachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapachrosha|gokigapachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gapachmusha|gapachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapachnkmusha|gogapachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapachmusha|gokigapachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gapachsherasha|gapachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogapachnksherasha|gogapachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigapachsherasha|gokigapachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gapachngasha|gapachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogapachnkngasha|gogapachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigapachngasha|gokigapachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gapachyasha|gapachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogapachnkyasha|gogapachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigapachyasha|gokigapachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gapachyamasha|gapachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogapachnkyamasha|gogapachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigapachyamasha|gokigapachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gapachn眉sh毛sha|gapachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogapachnkn眉sh毛sha|gogapachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigapachn眉sh毛sha|gokigapachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapachn眉rosha|gapachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapachnkn眉rosha|gogapachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapachn眉rosha|gokigapachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gapachn眉musha|gapachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapachnkn眉musha|gogapachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapachn眉musha|gokigapachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gapachsh毛n眉sha|gapachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogapachnksh毛n眉sha|gogapachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigapachsh毛n眉sha|gokigapachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapachsh毛rosha|gapachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapachnksh毛rosha|gogapachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapachsh毛rosha|gokigapachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gapachsh毛musha|gapachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapachnksh毛musha|gogapachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapachsh毛musha|gokigapachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gapachron眉sha|gapachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogapachnkron眉sha|gogapachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigapachron眉sha|gokigapachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gapachrosh毛sha|gapachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogapachnkrosh毛sha|gogapachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigapachrosh毛sha|gokigapachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gapachromusha|gapachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapachnkromusha|gogapachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapachromusha|gokigapachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gapachmun眉sha|gapachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogapachnkmun眉sha|gogapachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigapachmun眉sha|gokigapachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gapachmush毛sha|gapachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogapachnkmush毛sha|gogapachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigapachmush毛sha|gokigapachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapachmurosha|gapachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapachnkmurosha|gogapachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapachmurosha|gokigapachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gapach|gapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:g忙p忙ch|g忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogapach|hogapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hog忙p忙ch|hog忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogapach|hohogapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohog忙p忙ch|hohog忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉gapach|n眉gapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉g忙p忙ch|n眉g忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉gapach|n眉n眉gapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉g忙p忙ch|n眉n眉g忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂gapach|n茂gapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂g忙p忙ch|n茂g忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂gapach|n茂n茂gapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂g忙p忙ch|n茂n茂g忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugapach|lugapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lug忙p忙ch|lug忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugapach|lulugapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulug忙p忙ch|lulug忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligapach|ligapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lig忙p忙ch|lig忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligapach|liligapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilig忙p忙ch|lilig忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogapach|kogapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kog忙p忙ch|kog忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogapach|kokogapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokog忙p忙ch|kokog忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegapach|kegapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keg忙p忙ch|keg忙p忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegapach|kekegapach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeg忙p忙ch|kekeg忙p忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
